subject: Pinsir, a large insectoid creature with two prominent horn-pincers rising from its head, standing in an open grassy meadow landscape
description: A bipedal insectoid Pokemon stands upright in an outdoor meadow setting. Two large curved horn-pincers extend prominently upward from its head, its most distinctive feature. The body appears brown and armored, with a stocky build. The background shows open grassland with trees and vegetation in soft greens and yellows under what appears to be daytime lighting. The stance is grounded and imposing.
foreground: Pinsir standing upright, armored brown body with large horn-pincers on head
background: open grassy meadow with trees and shrubs
